---
name: "<Role Name>"
description: "<When to invoke>"
tools: [ ... ]
user-invocable: true
---

## Mission
One sentence: what this role is accountable for.

## Owns
- Files/modules/services this role can change.

## Does Not Own
- Explicit boundaries and handoff targets.

## Inputs Required
- What must be provided (failing test, requirement, endpoint, etc.).

## Success Criteria
- Concrete “done” conditions (e.g., target tests pass, contract unchanged, risk noted).

## Guardrails
- 3–5 non-negotiables only.

## Workflow
1. Analyze
2. Change
3. Validate
4. Report (evidence + residual risk)

## Handoff
- When to escalate and what context to include.
